task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the JFrog Artifactory web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the JFrog Artifactory UI loaded in a web browser, typically at http://localhost:8082.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Proxies configuration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Proxies' settings page within the Administration module (often represented by a gear icon).

task_completion.description: Verify the Proxy Key is correctly named 'corporate-proxy'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the string 'corporate-proxy' entered into the 'Proxy Key' field on the new proxy form, or displayed in the saved proxies list.

task_completion.description: Verify the Host and Port are correctly configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'proxy.acme-corp.internal' in the Host field and '8080' in the Port field of the proxy configuration form.

task_completion.description: Verify the proxy username is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'proxyuser' entered in the Username field. The password field should also appear filled (usually masked with dots/asterisks).

task_completion.description: Verify the proxy is enabled as the system default.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Default Proxy' checkbox being checked in the configuration form, or a 'Default' badge/indicator next to 'corporate-proxy' in the proxies list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Artifactory web GUI to configure the proxy.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the web browser and Artifactory UI, rather than just terminal windows executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual JFrog Artifactory application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine JFrog Artifactory web application, not a text editor, a mock HTML page, or notes app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected answers into a terminal or text file to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The proxy details must be entered into the actual input fields of the Artifactory proxy configuration form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The proxy must be configured in JFrog Artifactory (http://localhost:8082) with the following exact values: Proxy Key: 'corporate-proxy', Host: 'proxy.acme-corp.internal', Port: '8080', Username: 'proxyuser'. The proxy must be explicitly set as the default proxy (is_default: true).
